title: Utopia Towels - Premium Hand Towels - 100% Combed Ring Spun Cotton, Ultra Soft and Highly Absorbent, Extra Large Thick Hand towels 41 x 71 cm, Hotel & Spa Quality Hand Towels (6-Pack) (Grey)
features: 6 Piece hand towel set - The set comprises of 6 luxury hand towels each measuring 41 x 71 cm.
Terrific & splendid quality - Our hand towels are weaved with luxurious quality 100% ring spun cotton making them fade-resistant and convenient.

Ideal gift – Perfect for holidays, housewarming gifts, wedding gifts, Mother’s Day gifts, engagement gifts, bridal showers, birthdays, Christmas, and homecoming, this is a great gift for everyone on your shopping list.
Supple and absorbent – The texture of the towel has a soft hand-feel while the composition enables it to be highly absorbent and durable.
Care Instructions - It is recommended to wash the towels separately, to minimize lint. Avoid ironing or bleaching the towels, to retain the longevity of the set.
